events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, was born on July 7, 1940, and celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Big 86
angles.copy: Ringo Starr, the man behind the beat for the Fab Four, hits 86 today! What's your favourite Ringo moment, on or off the drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist, Brian May, was born on July 19, 1947, and celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the legendary Brian May of Queen! From stadium anthems to astrophysics, the man truly rocks. What's your top Queen track?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943, and celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still got the moves! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones tune to get you moving?

events.title: MTV Launched 45 Years Ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV launched and changed music forever! Remember the excitement of seeing your favourite artists on screen? What was the first video you properly obsessed over?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on August 29, 1994, marking a significant moment in British music history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Impact
angles.copy: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns another year older this month! That album defined a generation. What's your go-to track from the Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, becoming a pivotal moment in music and counterculture history.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for peace, love, and music at Woodstock. If you could have been there, which artist would you have most wanted to see?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, and would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, 49 years since we lost the King of Rock and Roll. His music still moves millions. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was tragically shot on September 7, 1996, and later died on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Impact
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today. His voice and lyrics continue to resonate decades after his untimely passing. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, passed away on September 18, 1970, and would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Hendrix's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. His music and revolutionary guitar playing changed everything. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring its legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Icon
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road', an album as iconic as its cover. What's your standout track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951, and celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Hynde's Rocking Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as hard as ever with The Pretenders. What's your favourite track from her incredible career?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a successful solo artist, was born on September 21, 1972, and celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Our Kid's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to Liam Gallagher! From Oasis anthems to his solo hits, the man's still got it. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' Anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK in 1975, becoming a timeless anthem for peace. (The album was released in 1971).

angles.name: Imagine The Message
angles.copy: John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine' was released in the UK this month in '75, its message still as relevant today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple Released First iPod 25 Years Ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: The iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed personal music forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Which 007 theme song gets your heart racing the most, and who's your favourite Bond actor?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, the legendary co-founder of The Beatles, was born on October 9, 1940, and would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Enduring Spirit
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace live on. What's your favourite John Lennon song?
